falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above the 30-day average volume on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would signal strong conviction in a breakout or reversal, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a clear directional move.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) crosses above 70 and stays above it for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate overbought conditions and a potential reversal from a bearish trend, disproving the 'HOLD' by confirming a shift in momentum.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
